_doc: Quarantine list for raw-birds fold (consolidate_siblings.py). Bird IDs in 'excluded_bird_ids' are skipped during cross-arm fold. Birds in 'candidates' are flagged for review — promote one to 'excluded_bird_ids' once confirmed a real regression rather than noise floor.

candidates.reason: Δ_net negative at r46. Single observation; within ~±0.005 noise floor by absolute magnitude but slightly outside. Promote only if regression repeats across ≥2 rounds.
Δ_net negative at r46. Comfortably within noise floor. Probably keep folded; flag for review if a later round shows ≤-0.005.
